params.name: Da Vinci's Notes
params.source:
* Grandmaster Scrolls (0.81%), Lottery Machine (0.09%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF), Wish Box, Wishing (0.08%)
* [[Indigent Nobleman]] (810k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}})
* Organ Value Pack II ($49.99)
params.description:
On May 5, 1519 AD, Leonardo Da Vinci's manuscript, which contained lots of writings, were completed.

Da Vinci's manuscript was written in a special way, which can only be read from a mirror. The manuscript is more than 7,000 pages long, and only 5,000 pages exist now. The subjects mentioned included biology, engineering design, and mechanics. Da Vinci loved writing notes. After his death, he left a large number of disordered manuscripts that are bizarre and difficult to read. The annotation wri …
